---
title: "IRT / RTSM UAT Snapshot"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: darkly
    embed-resources: true
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: play-circle
        text: Shiny app
        href: ../shiny
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: png
---

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2); library(knitr)
source("../shiny/R/logic.R")
d <- uat_load("../templates")
g <- uat_gate(d$tests, d$defects, d$trace)
s <- uat_summary(d$tests, d$defects, d$trace)
```

## Row {height="8%"}

::: {.card}
**Read-only shareable snapshot**, computed from the validated UAT data (`templates/*.csv`). It does not connect to the IRT. The interactive tool is the [Shiny app](../shiny). Operations-only, synthetic, no PHI. We say *participant*, not *subject*.
:::

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Test scripts"
list(icon = "list-check", color = "#222630", value = s$total)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Passed"
list(icon = "check-circle", color = "success", value = s$pass)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Failed"
list(icon = "x-circle", color = "danger", value = s$fail)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Open defects"
list(icon = "bug", color = "warning", value = s$open_def)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Requirements traced"
list(icon = "diagram-3", color = "info", value = paste0(s$cov, "%"))
```

## Row {height="36%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Go-live sign-off gate"
#| results: asis
tick <- function(ok, txt) sprintf('<div style="margin:4px 0;font-size:15px"><span style="color:%s;font-weight:700">%s</span> %s</div>',
  if (ok) "#43c47d" else "#e8657a", if (ok) "&#10004;" else "&#10008;", txt)
bg <- if (g$go) "#1e3a28" else "#3a1e24"; bd <- if (g$go) "#43c47d" else "#e8657a"
cat(sprintf('<div style="background:%s;border:1px solid %s;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px">', bg, bd))
cat(sprintf('<div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:#e9edf7">%s</div>', g$verdict))
cat(tick(g$crit_fail == 0, sprintf("<b>%d</b> critical test(s) not yet passing", g$crit_fail)))
cat(tick(g$open_cm == 0,  sprintf("<b>%d</b> open critical/major defect(s)", g$open_cm)))
cat(tick(g$trace_gap == 0, sprintf("<b>%d</b> requirement(s) without a test", g$trace_gap)))
cat('<div style="font-size:12px;color:#94a1c0;margin-top:10px">Conjunctive: all three must hold. The gate packages the evidence, a named human signs.</div></div>')
```

```{r}
#| title: "Execution by area"
df <- uat_area_counts(d$tests)
ggplot(df, aes(Freq, Area, fill = Status)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pass"="#43c47d","Fail"="#e8657a","Blocked"="#e0a64c",
    "In Progress"="#5b8cff","Not Run"="#6b7794"), drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Tests", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "top", plot.background = element_rect(fill="#222630", colour=NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill="#222630", colour=NA),
        text = element_text(colour="#e9edf7"), axis.text = element_text(colour="#c5cee4"),
        panel.grid = element_line(colour="#3a4157"),
        legend.key = element_rect(fill="#222630", colour=NA))
```

## Row {height="36%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Test scripts"
tt <- d$tests[, c("TestID","Area","Priority","TestTitle","Status")]
kable(tt, col.names = c("Test","Area","Priority","Title","Status"), row.names = FALSE)
```
